title: ismene × deflexa
intro: Ismene × deflexa, also known as the 'wild Jonquil' or 'Jonquil', is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ismene × deflexa include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Ismene × deflexa often involve using the flowers, leaves, and bulbs in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
